---
title: 'Untitled Post'
date: '2016-03-22T23:32:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '5496560344115376368'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><h4 style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: verdana, geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 19.6px; margin: 0px; position: relative;"><br /><div style="font-weight: normal;"><br /><b>Comment on this post, or Hit me up on Twitter&nbsp;<a href="https://twitter.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">@DarrellWolfe&nbsp;</a>,&nbsp;Google&nbsp;<a class="g-profile" data-gapiattached="true" data-gapiscan="true" data-onload="true" href="https://plus.google.com/106337514196493406365" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">+DarrellWolfe</a>, Facebook&nbsp;<a href="https://www.facebook.com/groups/907869989282584/" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">DarrellGWolfe</a>,&nbsp;</b></div><br /></h4><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: verdana, geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 19.6px;"><br /><br /></blockquote><br /><h4 style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: verdana, geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 19.6px; margin: 0px; position: relative;"><br />By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></h4><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: verdana, geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 19.6px;"><br /><i>Storyteller, Creative,&nbsp;<a href="http://www.16personalities.com/infj-personality" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">INFJ</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://www.gallupstrengthscenter.com/Purchase/en-US/Product?Path=Clifton%20StrengthsFinder" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Intellection</a>, Ideation, Input, Learner, Achiever</i></blockquote><br /><br /><br /><i>* I may include "Affiliate Links" which means I earn a commission when you buy some of the products I link to.&nbsp;</i><br /><br /><br /><br /><ul><br /><li><i>See my full about page and disclosures:&nbsp;<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/p/what-is-this.html" target="_blank">Click Here</a>.&nbsp;</i></li><br /></ul><br /><ul><br /><li><i>Also check out my&nbsp;<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/p/affiliate-store.html" target="_blank">Resources and Suggestions&nbsp;</a>for writers (<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/p/affiliate-store.html" target="_blank">here</a>).&nbsp;</i></li><br /></ul><br /><br /><br /><i></i><br /><br /><br /><br /><a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">It's Author Fun</a>&nbsp;By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a><br /><br /><br /><br />To Subscribe to the&nbsp;<a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/AuthorFun" target="_blank">RSS: Click Here</a><br /><br /><br /><br />For Non-Fiction stories with a lesson by&nbsp;<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe: Click Here</a><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><div style="clear: both; float: left; padding-bottom: 10px; text-align: right;"><br /><br /></div><br />
